claim_boundary: Hooks are preregistered terminal rules, not evidence that the corresponding one-off ran. A hook closes only when its sealed export is adjudicated.

criteria.F0_reject: nondeterministic decode OR nonfinite output OR unbilled component OR complete_physical_bytes>5394923
criteria.F1_reject: paired pre-router row-relative-L2 improvement CI95 low<=0 OR candidate cosine<=same-split parent OR any domain/low-margin stratum CI95 high<0
criteria.F2_reject: paired hidden improvement CI95 low<=0 OR route_matches<parent OR layer3 relative-L2>parent
criteria.replication: new prompt construction, context membership hash, and seed without refit

M2.extra_reject: static or worst-case BPW>0.98 OR gate precision<=event prevalence OR top-error-decile false-negative rate>0.50
M2.name: CONDITIONAL_HIGH_PRECISION_ISLANDS
prerequisites: inference-available gate and fully encoded threshold policy
LR11 fit/CV and LR12 score trigger predictions
M2.real_forward: only one frozen winner through cached layers 2-3

criteria.F0_reject: nondeterministic decode OR nonfinite output OR unbilled component OR complete_physical_bytes>5394923
criteria.F1_reject: paired pre-router row-relative-L2 improvement CI95 low<=0 OR candidate cosine<=same-split parent OR any domain/low-margin stratum CI95 high<0
criteria.F2_reject: paired hidden improvement CI95 low<=0 OR route_matches<parent OR layer3 relative-L2>parent
criteria.replication: new prompt construction, context membership hash, and seed without refit

M3.extra_reject: fit-only gain, score CI crossing zero, or more bytes than comparator
M3.name: NATIVE_STUDENTIZATION
prerequisites: exact native expert targets for LR11/LR12 cached x_l1
M3.real_forward: expert-only target capture; layers 2-3 only after frozen F1 win

criteria.F0_reject: nondeterministic decode OR nonfinite output OR unbilled component OR complete_physical_bytes>5394923
criteria.F1_reject: paired pre-router row-relative-L2 improvement CI95 low<=0 OR candidate cosine<=same-split parent OR any domain/low-margin stratum CI95 high<0
criteria.F2_reject: paired hidden improvement CI95 low<=0 OR route_matches<parent OR layer3 relative-L2>parent
criteria.replication: new prompt construction, context membership hash, and seed without refit

M4.name: CROSS_LAYER_STATE_ANCHOR
prerequisites: one physical compact representation installable at layers 2,31,60
teacher and compact trajectories on identical contexts
M4.real_forward: required at early/middle/late sentinels when prerequisite is met
M4.terminal_prerequisite_reject: PREREQUISITE_ABSENT when no coherent multi-layer compact candidate exists; a synthetic sentinel perturbation is not admissible evidence

criteria.F0_reject: nondeterministic decode OR nonfinite output OR unbilled component OR complete_physical_bytes>5394923
criteria.F1_reject: paired pre-router row-relative-L2 improvement CI95 low<=0 OR candidate cosine<=same-split parent OR any domain/low-margin stratum CI95 high<0
criteria.F2_reject: paired hidden improvement CI95 low<=0 OR route_matches<parent OR layer3 relative-L2>parent
criteria.replication: new prompt construction, context membership hash, and seed without refit

M6.extra_reject: native superiority requires a replicated byte-matched win; a CI crossing zero means no demonstrated advantage, not Doctor optimality
M6.name: DOCTOR_REMOVAL_NATIVE_INVERSION
prerequisites: same base+native module capped at 974848 bytes
same base+native module at full legal ceiling
M6.real_forward: cached F1 first; only one native winner through layers 2-3
